task_completion.description: Open the 'world_survey' project in the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField app is open and the layer panel or screen indicates that the 'world_survey' project or its layers ('sanctuary_zones', 'critical_water_sources') are loaded.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Sanctuary A' polygon and the 'Water Source' point on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is zoomed into the Tasmania region, displaying both the 'Sanctuary A' polygon and the nearby 'Water Source' point feature.
The 'sanctuary_zones' layer is selected and edit mode is active, indicated by a toggled pencil icon, vertex editing tools, or a crosshair cursor appearing on the map for geometry modification.

task_completion.description: Modify the boundary of the 'Sanctuary A' polygon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of vertex manipulation, such as the editing crosshair locked onto a polygon vertex and dragging it outward, or the polygon's outline actively changing shape.

task_completion.description: Ensure the polygon encompasses the 'Water Source' point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly adjusted boundary or fill of the 'Sanctuary A' polygon clearly covers and surrounds the location of the 'Water Source' point.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of saving the edits, such as tapping the checkmark to confirm geometry changes, toggling off edit mode and accepting the save prompt, or a 'changes saved' toast notification.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to modify the polygon.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField map and editing tools, rather than a terminal app (like Termux) running sqlite3 spatial queries to update the database.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing polygon rather than creating a new one from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original shape of 'Sanctuary A' is visible and being stretched/edited via its vertices, rather than being deleted and replaced by a newly drawn polygon.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual QField GIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match QField (map canvas, layer sidebar, digitizing crosshairs), not a generic database viewer or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project path: /sdcard/Android/data/ch.opengis.qfield/files/Imported Datasets/world_survey.gpkg. Target polygon to modify: 'Sanctuary A' in the 'sanctuary_zones' layer.
